inputs.text:
candid iPhone mirror selfie, full-body view from low angle, fit 27-year-old Chinease woman, supermodel face, light golden tan skin, long straight dark-brown hair with blonde highlights, fuller pear-shaped body 98-70-115, thick thighs, soft curves,
wearing luxurious midnight-navy satin and lace lingerie: sheer balconette bra with intricate black floral lace overlay and satin cups, matching high-waisted suspender belt with lace embroidery and garter straps, tiny navy lace thong, matching navy lace thigh-high stockings with wide embroidered tops,
sitting sideways on white hotel bed with legs crossed, one arm resting on bed, other hand holding iPhone up taking mirror selfie, soft neutral expression, slight pout, looking at mirror,
luxury hotel bedroom, large floor-to-ceiling windows with sheer white curtains, bright diffused natural daylight, white crisp bedding, beige headboard, wooden floor, minimal modern decor, gentle handheld shake, authentic iPhone photo look, mild film grain, photorealistic, highly detailed skin texture and lace details
